name: ds4cc
description: Read-only guidance for discovering reviewed DS4CC plugins and installing them with Grok Build, Codex, Claude Code, Kimi Code, Crush CLI, or GitHub Copilot CLI after source review.

interface.shortDescription: Browse and install DS4CC marketplace plugins across Grok, Codex, Claude, Kimi Code, Crush CLI
interface.longDescription: Meta-plugin documenting how to register the DS4CC marketplace and install plugins on Grok Build (paste-friendly), Codex CLI, Claude Code, Kimi Code CLI, Crush CLI, and GitHub Copilot CLI. Does not auto-install.
